ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added
Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: 70% smeltkaasbereiding (55% kaas (melk, zout, zuursel, microbieel stremsel), water, magere melkpoeder, weipoeder (melk), smeltzouten: polyfosfaten, trifosfaten, calciumcitraten), 30% broodsticks (tarwebloem, kokosolie, gist, gerstemoutextract, zout).
